{{Quote|Deploy for planetary bombardment and have Captain Harbid transmit our terms of surrender to the Xa Fel government.|[[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]|<ref name="TLC 5">[[The Last Command 5|''The Last Command'' 5]]</ref>}}
In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], in the final days of the [[Thrawn campaign]], a '''battle''' occurred at the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Xa Fel/Legends|Xa Fel]].

Under the command of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] fleet routed the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces after a thirty hour battle. The planetary government of Xa Fel surrendered to avoid a planetary bombardment.

After the New Republic defeat, Grand Admiral Thrawn left the system to organize the [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|Battle of Bilbringi]]. He let [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Harbid]] lead the deployment of ground forces on [[Xa Fel/Legends|Xa Fel]] and accepted the surrender of the planet.

The capture of Xa Fel allowed the Empire to take control of the [[Kanchen sector/Legends|Kanchen sector]].
